title: Goeppertia sellowii

Goeppertia sellowii is also known as a type of flowering plant and belongs to the genus Goeppertia. The plant is further classified into the order Zingiberales and the class Liliopsida. Goeppertia sellowii's classification is complex and may be subject to revision as new research emerges.
